title: Feedback - send a Bug feedback without names/email
scenario: Bug feedback submitted via App Settings > Feedback tab includes user's personal data (names, email) instead of being anonymized
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to App Settings (gear icon or menu).
5. Enter some text for the feedback description.
expected: The feedback is sent successfully without including the user's personal data (names, email).
